overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a futuristic open-world game (Cyberpunk 2077), showing a character running through a foggy urban periphery. The journey transitions from a muddy hillside trail through a shanty settlement and onto paved sidewalks, with a massive stadium structure and neon billboards visible through the haze.

events.description: character transitions from walking to running downhill
passing from open hillside into denser tree cover

agents.ego_description: running downhill on a muddy trail toward a distant stadium structure visible through fog

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red umbrella walking uphill against the flow
pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead on the path

entered.detail: futuristic dome stadium with lattice framework visible through heavy fog
tall palm trees lining the hillside path
muddy uneven path with scattered rocks and debris
dark rock outcrops and boulders on the hillside

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy hillside trail with a large futuristic stadium visible in the distance. The character runs downhill on a muddy path lined with palm trees and rocks, passing pedestrians walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: informal shanty settlement with trash piles

events.description: entering shanty area with makeshift wooden stalls and garbage piles
large vertical red digital billboard becomes prominent in the skyline

agents.ego_description: running through a shanty settlement, navigating around trash piles and market stalls

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red umbrella walking ahead on the path
pedestrian sitting on concrete bench beside the trail

entered.detail: tall vertical billboard displaying bright red digital advertisements
large mounds of blue garbage bags and scattered debris
makeshift market stall with corrugated metal roof
low concrete seating with NPCs resting

segments.scene_description: The character runs through an informal settlement area characterized by trash piles and makeshift stalls. A prominent red digital billboard appears through the fog, and the path remains muddy as palm trees line the route.

events.description: transitioning from dirt trail onto paved concrete sidewalk
crossing the asphalt road with other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: transitioning from dirt to pavement and crossing a street with moving traffic

notable_agents.action: car driving along the road parallel to the sidewalk
group of pedestrians crossing the road together

entered.detail: concrete sidewalk with distinctive red painted curbs
paved two-lane road with moving vehicle traffic
low-rise houses with power lines running alongside
wooden utility poles with overhead electrical wires

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the dirt trail and steps onto a paved sidewalk, then crosses an asphalt road with other pedestrians. Residential buildings and power lines appear on the right while vehicles pass on the left.

events.description: tall futuristic skyscrapers become visible through the fog in the distance
character slows from running to walking pace

agents.ego_description: walking along a paved avenue toward the distant stadium and futuristic skyline

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with illuminated red umbrella walking opposite direction

entered.detail: tall glass and steel towers of the city center visible through fog
derelict green vehicle parked off the sidewalk in grass
the dome stadium now appears closer and more detailed ahead

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking along a palm-lined paved avenue toward the city center. Futuristic skyscrapers and the large stadium structure dominate the foggy horizon, while an abandoned car sits off the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rugged, foggy hillside trail that gradually transitions into a paved urban avenue. It begins with a character running downhill along a muddy path lined with palm trees and rocks, with a massive futuristic stadium looming in the distance. As the character moves forward, the terrain shifts into an informal settlement filled with trash piles and makeshift stalls, where a prominent red digital billboard emerges through the haze. The scene then opens up as the character leaves the dirt trail to cross an asphalt road and step onto a paved sidewalk flanked by residential buildings and passing vehicles. Finally, the path evolves into a palm-lined avenue leading toward the city center, where futuristic skyscrapers and the stadium dominate the foggy horizon beside an abandoned car.
